### Data Source
<!-- Where did you get this data? Must be from public/open sources -->


### Checklist
- [ ] Data is in valid JSON format
- [ ] Data follows the existing schema (see `schemas/`)
- [ ] Data is from a reliable public source
- [ ] I have verified the accuracy of the data
- [ ] No copyrighted or proprietary data is included
